auditor: Prairie Point Chartered Professional Accountants LLP
economic_notes: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation is the government business enterprise (gaming). Golden Eagle Casino and Charitable Entertainment Centre, Wauzhushk Onigum Foundation, and Kinew Day Care are fully consolidated subsidiaries. COVID-19 noted as post-balance sheet uncertainty.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) gaming revenues not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification due to lack of dual custody over cash and gaming cards; (2) incomplete inventory of tangible capital assets as Group has not fully adopted PS 3150. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Golden Eagle Casino and Charitable Entertainment Centre, Wauzhushk Onigum Foundation, Kinew Day Care. One GBE: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation (accounted for on modified equity basis). Accounts receivable dropped significantly from $7.2M to $1.15M year over year. Capital asset acquisitions of $12.1M significantly increased TCA from $14.4M to $25.7M. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Health Canada + Province of Ontario + Shooniiya Wa-Biitong + Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
